name: Marc Soler
summary: Highly experienced DevOps Engineer with over 8 years of expertise in architecting scalable cloud infrastructure and automating CI/CD pipelines. Proven track record in optimizing system reliability and reducing deployment latency for high-traffic enterprise applications.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Lead the migration of legacy monolithic services to a microservices architecture on AWS using Kubernetes. Implemented GitOps workflows with ArgoCD, resulting in a 40% reduction in deployment time.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Managed multi-region infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible. Developed custom Python scripts to automate monitoring alerts and log aggregation across distributed systems.

experience.title: Systems Administrator
experience.description: Maintained on-premise server clusters and optimized database performance. Assisted in the initial transition to containerized environments using Docker.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
